zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏中性
zh.content:
SOL/USD最新价86.2，24小时仅涨0.22%，价格贴近SMA20的86.19650，说明短线多空力量接近平衡，趋势暂未形成明确突破。

MACD为-0.0557，仍处弱势区间，但负值不深，空头动能有限。RSI缺失，需避免过度判断超买或超卖，重点观察量价配合。

短线支撑看85.99，跌破可能回踩85.7附近；阻力位看86.28，若放量突破，可上看86.6至87.0区间。

交易上建议以区间思路为主，靠近支撑轻仓试多，跌破止损；突破86.28并站稳后再追多，未放量前不宜重仓。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading almost flat at 86.2, with a modest 24-hour gain of 0.22%. The tight daily range between 85.99 and 86.28 shows low volatility and limited directional conviction. Price is sitting nearly on the SMA(20) at 86.1965, suggesting the market is balanced rather than trending strongly. For now, Solana appears to be consolidating around a short-term equilibrium zone.

The MACD reading of -0.0557 points to slightly negative momentum, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation. RSI is unavailable, so overbought or oversold conditions cannot be reliably assessed. Because price is hovering just above the 20-period average, bulls have not lost control, but momentum remains too weak to confirm a meaningful upside breakout.

Immediate support sits near 85.99, the session low, followed by a deeper short-term support area around 85.80 if sellers gain traction. Resistance is close at 86.28, the session high, with a cleaner breakout level near 86.50. A move above that zone could invite follow-through buying, while a break below 85.99 may signal renewed downside pressure.

Traders may consider waiting for confirmation rather than entering inside this narrow range. A bullish setup improves if SOL/USD holds above 86.20 and breaks 86.28 with stronger volume. Conversely, short-term sellers may look for weakness below 85.99, targeting lower support levels. Risk management is important here, as the current range is too compressed to offer strong directional conviction.
